summary: SLA113 Iteration 14 testing complete. All new Night Queue background worker features working: Worker status endpoint returns running/active/completed/total counts, Worker toggle starts/stops worker, Jobs created with named stages based on preset (e.g., ARCADE_40 has 5 stages), Worker auto-advances jobs every 3 seconds, Stage transitions work correctly (pending -> processing -> completed). Backend: 23/23 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified including stage-by-stage progress bars with stage names.
critical_code_review_comments: Worker auto-starts on server boot via lifespan in server.py
Worker processes up to 10 jobs per cycle every 3 seconds
Stage progress increments randomly 20-45% per worker cycle (MOCKED)
Job presets map to specific named stages (e.g., FANTASY_RPG = [Lore Generation, Skill Trees, Monster AI, Dungeon Layout, Package Export])
Frontend auto-polls every 3 seconds when NIGHT QUEUE tab is active
All data-testid attributes present on new Night Queue elements
Worker status shows Active/Done/Total counts in real-time
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed jobs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 now has 12 tabs across 4 partitions. Night Queue has been upgraded with background worker that auto-processes jobs through named stages. Worker runs every 3s. Job presets: ARCADE_40 (5 stages), ARCADE_60 (6 stages), SLOTS_20 (5 stages), OPEN_WORLD (7 stages), CASINO_SUITE (5 stages), GTA5_TYPE (5 stages), COD_WARFARE (5 stages), FANTASY_RPG (5 stages). Worker can be started/stopped via toggle button. Frontend shows stage-by-stage progress bars with stage names.

backend_api.notes: Creates job with named stages based on preset
Jobs auto-advance through stages every 3 seconds
Stages transition pending -> processing -> completed correctly
ARCADE_40, ARCADE_60, SLOTS_20, OPEN_WORLD, CASINO_SUITE, GTA5_TYPE, COD_WARFARE, FANTASY_RPG all create correct stages

frontend_ui.notes: Shows Worker Engine status with Active/Done/Total counts
Toggles worker state, button text changes accordingly
Preset dropdown with 10 options, priority buttons (low/normal/high)
Stage-by-stage progress bars with stage names visible
Green pulsing indicator appears when worker is running
Build Pipeline, Compliance, Deploy Center, Revenue Pipelines, Vision Smith all working

mocked_apis_list: Night Queue stage progression is simulated (random 20-45% increments per worker cycle)
Audio Forge is visual-only (no real audio generation)
Compliance pass/fail is randomized (85% pass rate)
Deploy URLs are generated mock URLs (not real CDNs)
